Custom Lacrosse Stat Tracking

Track Every Rep.
Own Every Stat.

A custom-built stat tracking app and analytics dashboard — built for your player, your position, and the exact data that matters for college recruiting.

SEE HOW IT WORKS GET YOURS
What You Get

Built for Lacrosse.
Built for Recruiting.

Every feature is designed for one purpose — helping your player stand out with real data.

📱

Mobile Stat Tracker

One-handed, sideline-ready app built for your phone. Tap to track goals, shots, assists, ground balls, and more in real time during live games.

🎯

Position-Specific Stats

We customize the tracked stats for your player's position — attackers, midfielders, defenders, FOGOs, LSMs, SSDMs, and goalies each have different needs.

📊

Season Dashboard

A full analytics dashboard that visualizes every stat across the season — performance trends, shot breakdown, possession, discipline, and more.

🔗

Google Sheets Sync

Every game auto-saves to a private Google Sheet. Your data lives in the cloud, always accessible, always organized.

✏️

Live Edit & Undo

Tap the wrong button? No problem. Long-press any stat to edit it on the spot, or hit undo to reverse the last entry instantly.

🎓

Recruiting-Ready Reports

Season summaries and game logs formatted for college coaches — show the numbers that prove your player belongs at the next level.

The App

Sideline-Ready.
One-Handed.

Track every stat from your phone during a live game. Big buttons, clear numbers, instant save to your dashboard.

The Dashboard

Every Game.
Every Stat.
One View.

A full-season analytics dashboard that updates automatically after every game. Built for parents, players, and coaches.

The Process

Up & Running
In 1 Day.

We handle all the setup. You just show up and track.

01

Tell Us About Your Player

Name, number, position, and the stats that matter most for their recruiting profile.

02

We Build Your App

Custom stat tracker and analytics dashboard built and deployed to your own private website.

03

Add to Your Home Screen

One tap to open, one-handed to use. Works like a native app on any iPhone or Android.

04

Track, Analyze, Recruit

Every game feeds your dashboard. Every stat builds your recruiting story.

Get Started
